captions_untagged.explicit: Finally taking a break from our long hike to crush some pizza with the best trail buddies. Our group hiking hobby definitely requires these kind of high-calorie rewards.
captions_untagged.moderate: It's been so long since we managed to get everyone together on a Saturday afternoon for a proper outdoor lunch.
captions_untagged.no_leak: Nothing beats a makeshift bench in the shade and some quick food after spending the whole morning on the trails.
